name: Amazon Astro
short_description: A wheeled household robot for home monitoring, video calls, and Alexa-based assistance.
long_description: A small wheeled domestic robot with a screen 'face', a periscope camera, and Alexa built in. It moves the smart-speaker assistant into a mobile body, sitting between appliance, pet, and roving security camera in the home.

images.caption: Amazon Astro home robot.
images.alt_text: Amazon's Astro home robot, a small white and black wheeled device with a round display screen showing two eyes, on a wood floor.
